LanguageData.UB_SNS_Lightkeeper.title: Lightkeeper
LanguageData.UB_SNS_Lightkeeper.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was chosen by the village elder to be the Lightkeeper. [PAWN_pronoun] would stay awake while everyone else would sleep, keeping all the village torches lit to ensure the sun would rise again in the morning. This title was an honor, and [PAWN_nameDef] was given high status for it.
